title: Junior Business Development Manager at Wadhwa Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Wadhwa Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
